    simp only [LinearMap.mem_ker, LinearMap.prod_apply, Prod.mk_eq_zero, LinearMap.coe_comp,
      Submodule.coe_subtypeL, Function.comp_apply, Submodule.mkQ_apply] at hm
    obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hm
    rw [Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at h2
    have : m.1 ∈ T := h2
    obtain ⟨⟨a, ha⟩, ha'⟩ := this
    use a, ?_, by simp [ha']
    exact hp ▸ Ideal.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors p.1 ha

    obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := Submodule.Quotient.mk_surjective T q
    use 1, Submonoid.one_mem _, by simp [f, ← sub_eq_zero, ← Submodule.Quotient.mk_sub, t.2]

    simp only [LinearMap.prod_apply, Prod.mk.injEq]
    constructor
    · ext

    · simp [hm]

      Submodule.subtypeL_apply, ZeroMemClass.coe_eq_zero, Submodule.mkQ_apply,
      Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at hm
    obtain ⟨⟨_, h1⟩, h2⟩ := hm
    have : m ∈ T := h2
    have hm_torsion := Submodule.torsion_eq_nonZeroDivisors_smul_top A M ▸ this
    rw [Submodule.mem_smul_pointwise_iff_exists] at hm_torsion
    obtain ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩ := hm_torsion

let T := Submodule.torsion A M
  let f : (T × M ⧸ T) →ₗ[A] M := (T.subtype).coprod (T.mkQ.liftQ T.subtype (by simp [LinearMap.range_le_iff_comap]))
  have hker : LinearMap.ker f = ⊥ := by
    ext ⟨⟨t, ht⟩, q⟩
    simp only [LinearMap.mem_ker, LinearMap.coprod_apply, Submodule.coe_subtype, 
      Submodule.mkQ_apply, Submodule.mem_bot, Prod.mk_eq_zero]
    constructor
    · intro h
      obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := Submodule.Quotient.mk_surjective T q
      simp only [← hm, Submodule.liftQ_apply] at h
      have : m + t = 0 := h
      have hmem : m ∈ T := by simp [← this, ht]
      constructor
      · ext; exact this.symm ▸ (neg_mem hmem : -m ∈ T).2.symm ▸ (add_neg_cancel m)
      · rw [← hm]; exact Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero.mpr hmem
    · rintro ⟨rfl, rfl⟩; simp
  have hrange : LinearMap.range f = ⊤ := by
    rw [eq_top_iff]
    intro m _
    use (0, Submodule.Quotient.mk m)
    simp [f]
  exact ⟨f, by rw [hker]; exact Module.isPseudoNull_bot, by rw [hrange]; exact Module.isPseudoNull_bot⟩

  let f : M →ₗ[A] Submodule.torsion A M × M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M := 
    LinearMap.prod (0 : M →ₗ[A] T) (T.mkQ)
  have hker : LinearMap.ker f = T := by simp [f, LinearMap.ker_prod]
  have hrange : LinearMap.range f = Submodule.prod ⊥ ⊤ := by
    ext ⟨t, q⟩
    simp only [LinearMap.mem_range, Submodule.mem_prod, Submodule.mem_bot, Submodule.mem_top, 
      and_true]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨m, rfl⟩; simp [f]
    · rintro rfl
      obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := Submodule.Quotient.mk_surjective T q
      exact ⟨m, by simp [f]⟩

set T := Submodule.torsion A M
  refine ⟨LinearMap.prod T.subtype.codRestrict (fun x => x.2) T.mkQ, ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton]
    intro p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro m
    simp only [LinearMap.mem_ker, LinearMap.prod_apply, Prod.mk_eq_zero, 
      LinearMap.codRestrict_apply, Submodule.coe_subtype, Submodule.mkQ_apply] at m
    obtain ⟨hm1, hm2⟩ := m
    rw [Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at hm2
    exact ⟨1, Submonoid.one_mem _, by simp [hm1, Subtype.ext_iff]⟩
  · rw [Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton]
    intro p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro ⟨x, hx⟩
    obtain ⟨⟨t, m⟩, rfl⟩ := Submodule.Quotient.mk_surjective _ ⟨x, hx⟩
    obtain ⟨⟨s, hs⟩, hsm⟩ := t.2
    use s, hs
    simp only [Submodule.mkQ_apply, Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero]
    constructor
    · ext; exact hsm
    · exact Submodule.smul_mem _ _ (Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero.mp m)
exact ⟨(Submodule.torsion A M).subtype.prod (Submodule.torsion A M).mkQ, Module.isPseudoNull_bot A, Module.isPseudoNull_bot A⟩

set T := Submodule.torsion A M
  let f : M →ₗ[A] (T × M ⧸ T) := LinearMap.prod (T.subtypeL.comp (Submodule.torsion A M).ofTorsion) (T.mkQ)
  use f
  constructor
  · rw [LinearMap.isPseudoNull_ker_iff]
    intro p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro m
    obtain ⟨hm_ker⟩ := m
    simp only [LinearMap.mem_ker, LinearMap.prod_apply, Prod.mk_eq_zero, LinearMap.comp_apply,
      Submodule.subtypeL_apply] at hm_ker
    obtain ⟨_, hq⟩ := hm_ker
    rw [Submodule.mkQ_apply, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at hq
    obtain ⟨⟨s, hs⟩, hsm⟩ := hq m.1
    use s, by
      simp only [Ideal.primeCompl, Submonoid.mem_mk, Subsemigroup.mem_mk, Set.mem_compl_iff,
        SetLike.mem_coe]
      by_contra hmem
      have : s ∈ nonZeroDivisors A := p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors ⟨hmem, hp⟩
      rw [mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff] at this
      have := this s rfl
      exact hs this
    simp only [SetLike.mk_smul_mk, Submodule.mk_eq_zero]
    exact hsm
  · rw [LinearMap.isPseudoNull_coker_iff]
    intro p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro m
    obtain ⟨t, q⟩ := m
    obtain ⟨q', rfl⟩ := Submodule.Quotient.mk_surjective T q
    obtain ⟨⟨s, hs⟩, hsq⟩ := t.2
    use s, by
      simp only [Ideal.primeCompl, Submonoid.mem_mk, Subsemigroup.mem_mk, Set.mem_compl_iff,
        SetLike.mem_coe]
      by_contra hmem
      have : s ∈ nonZeroDivisors A := p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors ⟨hmem, hp⟩
      rw [mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff] at this
      have := this s rfl
      exact hs this
    simp only [Prod.smul_mk, SetLike.mk_smul_mk, Submodule.mkQ_apply]
    rw [Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul]
    apply Submodule.Quotient.eq.mpr
    simp only [Submodule.mem_torsion, smul_sub]
    use ⟨s, hs⟩
    simp [hsq]

set T := Submodule.torsion A M
  refine ⟨T.subtype.coprod (T.liftQ LinearMap.id (fun x hx => hx)), ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [LinearMap.isPseudoNull_ker]
    intro p hp
    rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]
    intro ⟨⟨t, m⟩, hm⟩
    simp only [LinearMap.mem_ker, LinearMap.coprod_apply, Submodule.coe_subtype, 
      Submodule.liftQ_apply] at hm
    simp only [SetLike.mk_smul_mk, Submodule.mk_eq_zero]
    obtain ⟨s, hs, hsm⟩ := Submodule.mem_torsion_iff.mp t.2
    use s, hs
    ext <;> simp [hsm, show s • m = 0 by rw [← hm]; simp [hsm]]
  · rw [LinearMap.isPseudoNull_coker, Submodule.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton]
    intro p hp
    rw [Submodule.Quotient.subsingleton_iff, LinearMap.range_coprod]
    simp only [Submodule.range_subtype, Submodule.range_liftQ]
    rw [← Submodule.comap_map_eq_of_injective (Submodule.injective_subtype T)]
    simp [Submodule.map_subtype_top]
